differential_diagnoses: Subacute encephalopathy due to thyroid dysfunction
next_steps: Obtain thyroid function panel (TSH, free T4, free T3) and TSH receptor antibodies
Perform lumbar puncture for autoimmune encephalitis panel (anti-NMDA, etc.)
Order serum ceruloplasmin and 24-hour urine copper
Initiate continuous EEG monitoring to rule out non-convulsive status epilepticus
Check serum creatine kinase and myoglobin to assess for rhabdomyolysis or NMS
Re-evaluate current medication list and discontinue potential offending agents
